data.name: Perform triage
data.customCode:
def custom_code(active_process: ActiveProcess) -> None:
    patients = active_process.patients
    appointments = active_process.appointments
    medicalrecords = active_process.medicalrecords

    appointment = appointments.first()

    import random
    priorities = ['low', 'medium', 'high', 'critical']
    random_priority = random.choice(priorities)
    print(f'Triage priority assigned: {random_priority}', flush=True)
    appointment.priority = random_priority
    appointment.save()

data.name: Notify discharge
data.customCode:
def custom_code(active_process: ActiveProcess) -> None:
    patients = active_process.patients
    appointments = active_process.appointments
    medicalrecords = active_process.medicalrecords
    prescriptions = active_process.prescriptions

    appointment = appointments.first()
    patient = patients.first()

    outcome = "discharged" if appointment.discharged else "admitted"

    print(f"Sending notification to {patient.email}: Your appointment has been {outcome}", flush=True)
